Name: EVOO Sales Revenue
Description: Income from bottled Miles EVOO sales (DTC store, gourmet buyers, export)

Name: Irrigation & Water Expense
Description: Drip irrigation, HydroSense controller, water charges for the north and east groves

Name: Fuel & Vehicle Expense
Description: Diesel for tractor and pickup, market runs to Baena and Córdoba

Name: Agricultural Supplies
Description: Organic inputs, netting, pruning tools and grove consumables

Name: Estate Operating Account
Description: Main operating bank account for Finca Miles day-to-day payments

Name: Accounts Receivable
Description: Outstanding buyer invoices awaiting payment (gourmet and export accounts)

Name: Accounts Payable
Description: Supplier bills not yet paid (irrigation, fuel, supplies, coop dues)

Name: Cooperative Dues Reserve
Description: Accrued monthly dues owed to Cooperativa Oleícola Sierra Morena

Name: Organic Certification Costs
Description: EU organic transition inspection fees and field-diary compliance costs (east grove)

Name: Retained Earnings
Description: Accumulated net earnings of the estate since 2020

Name: Equipment & Machinery
Description: Tractor maintenance, harvest equipment and pressing-related machinery costs

Name: Seasonal Labour & Payroll
Description: Wages for the seasonal harvest crew and Pedro's grove work via Gusto payroll

Name: Packaging & Bottling Expense
Description: Glass bottles, tins, labels, caps and gift boxes for the Miles range

Name: Tasting & Agritourism Income
Description: Income from estate tastings, grove tours and agritourism visits run by Soo-Jin

Name: Marketing & Website Expense
Description: Storefront hosting, PostHog analytics, label design and buyer newsletters

Name: Property Tax (IBI)
Description: Annual IBI municipal property tax on the Finca Miles estate in Baena

Name: Insurance Expense
Description: Crop, machinery and liability insurance for the grove and cortijo

Name: Export Freight & Customs
Description: Pallet freight, customs paperwork and logistics for Germany, UK and Switzerland

Name: Olive Oil Inventory
Description: Bottled and bulk Miles EVOO stock held at the cortijo store

Name: CaixaBank Savings Reserve
Description: Estate savings buffer held at CaixaBank for off-season and equipment outlay
